response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ programming experience and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure or distributed systems, with technical leadership over a cloud compute platform. The candidate's C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015; the rest of their ~15-year career is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang on web, mobile, and GIS applications. There is no evidence of cloud compute platform ownership, distributed systems leadership at scale, or formal tech-lead responsibilities, so core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Strong testing/TDD background and demonstrated mentoring via workshops, courses, and talks
Experience at large tech employers (Google, Meta) and with high-throughput services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months — far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership
Some employment entries (e.g., 'Founder, Amazon') are ambiguous and warrant clarification

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems leadership
